sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Qakbot Rundll32 Fake DLL Extension Execution
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects specific process tree behavior of a "rundll32" execution where the DLL doesn't have the ".dll" extension. This is often linked with potential Qakbot activity.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Pikabot Fake DLL Extension Execution Via Rundll32.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects specific process tree behavior linked to "rundll32" executions, wherein the associated DLL lacks a common ".dll" extension, often signaling potential Pikabot activity.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects Windows executables that write files with suspicious extensions
Detects a rundll32 that communicates with public IP addresses
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split), wagga (name)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Rundll32 Execution With Uncommon DLL Extension
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the execution of rundll32 with a command line that doesn't contain a common extension
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Tim Shelton, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Yassine Oukessou
